allow: PowerShell($out = flutter analyze lib/models/employe.dart lib/features/employes/employe_form_screen.dart lib/features/employes/employes_list_screen.dart 2>&1 | Out-String; $errs = \($out -split "`n"\) | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\berror\\b' }; if \($errs\) { $errs } else { "AUCUNE ERREUR" })
PowerShell($out = flutter analyze 2>&1 | Out-String; $errs = \($out -split "`n"\) | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\berror\\b' }; if \($errs\) { $errs } else { "AUCUNE ERREUR \(que info/warning\)" })
